items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.
items.title: platers/obsidian-linter: An Obsidian plugin that formats and styles your notes with a focus on configurability and extensibility.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that adds backlink tags and created/modified dates to the footer of your notes
items.title: jparkerweb/rich-foot: Obsidian plugin that adds backlink tags and created/modified dates to the footer of your notes

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian that allows you to automatically add beautiful banner images to your notes using the Pexels API.
items.title: jparkerweb/pexels-banner: Plugin for Obsidian that allows you to automatically add beautiful banner images to your notes using the Pexels API.

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian that renders interactive graphs from YAML.
items.title: DylanHojnoski/obsidian-graphs: Plugin for Obsidian that renders interactive graphs from YAML.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that prevents the creation of files with double extensions such as `.jpg.md`.
items.title: uoFishbox/obsidian-prevent-double-extension: Obsidian plugin that prevents the creation of files with double extensions such as `.jpg.md`.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian to make your notes interactive with inline input fields, metadata displays, and buttons.
items.title: mProjectsCode/obsidian-meta-bind-plugin: A plugin for Obsidian to make your notes interactive with inline input fields, metadata displays, and buttons.

items.content_html: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window. So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid. Enjoy it!
items.title: gitcpy/diagram-zoom-drag: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window.  So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid.  Enjoy it!

items.content_html: This Obsidian plugin integrates the power of Ollama's AI models directly into Obsidian.
items.title: jakedx6/Ollama-AI-Tools: This Obsidian plugin integrates the power of Ollama's AI models directly into Obsidian.

items.content_html: A utility plugin for managing my Obsidian-based knowledge management system.
items.title: cs-schmidt/vault-scripts: A utility plugin for managing my Obsidian-based knowledge management system.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that adds support to define input form and generate notes based on it
items.title: ArhiChief/obsidian-note-from-form: Obsidian plugin that adds support to define input form and generate notes based on it

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian providing a flexible way to create context-aware toolbars for your notes.
items.title: chrisgurney/obsidian-note-toolbar: Plugin for Obsidian providing a flexible way to create context-aware toolbars for your notes.

items.content_html: Plugin for https://obsidian.md/ that automatically selected same text occurrences in opened note
items.title: Krusty84/obsidian-occura-plugin: Plugin for https://obsidian.md/ that automatically selected same text occurrences in opened note

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin to apply spaced repetition to incrementally develop your notes.
items.title: zachmueller/spaced-everything: Obsidian plugin to apply spaced repetition to incrementally develop your notes.

items.content_html: A companion plugin for Flylighter.
items.title: Flylighter/obsidian-plugin: A companion plugin for Flylighter.

items.content_html: AI-powered Obsidian plugin that automatically generates tags and classifies metadata for your notes, enhancing organization and streamlining your knowledge management workflow.
items.title: GoBeromsu/Metadata-Auto-Classifier: AI-powered Obsidian plugin that automatically generates tags and classifies metadata for your notes, enhancing organization and streamlining your knowledge management workflow.

items.content_html: Converts a PGN file to a JSON file. Designed for displaying Chess.com games inside of Obsidian using the Chess Study plugin.
items.title: unkokaeru/pgn2json: Converts a PGN file to a JSON file. Designed for displaying Chess.com games inside of Obsidian using the Chess Study plugin.

items.content_html: This is a plugin for https://obsidian.md. It extracts Annotations from PDF Files.
items.title: munach/obsidian-extract-pdf-annotations: This is a plugin for https://obsidian.md. It extracts Annotations from PDF Files.
pandoralink/obsidian-excalidraw-plugin-scripts
